parameters.name: motion_id
parameters.description: ID from /api/action/motion/list. The app resolves task_type and motion/legacy/preset target from this ID.

parameters.name: blocking_type
parameters.description: Scheduler blocking mode while the motion is running.

parameters.name: duration_ms
parameters.description: Optional extra timeout. If set, stop_motion is triggered after this many milliseconds.
